name: Feature request

title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem should this feature solve?

## Proposed Feature

Describe the requested behavior.

## Expected Behavior

What should the user be able to do?

## Current / Actual Behavior

What currently blocks this workflow?

## Reproduction Or Example Workflow

If relevant, describe the public-safe workflow this would improve.

## Environment

- TuringResearch Plus version:
- OS:
- Python version:
- Live mode enabled: yes / no
- Plugins enabled: yes / no

## Data Sensitivity

- Data involved: public demo / public data / private data / unknown
- Should this work with fake/default mode? yes / no
- Does it require live adapters? yes / no

## Public Tools Or Modules

List any affected MCP tools, contracts, packages, or docs.

## Source Hygiene

Confirm that supporting references are public, user-owned, or authorized. Do not include private, leaked, NDA, proprietary, or incompatible-license implementation material.

Confirm that the request does not require committing secrets, raw data, private
model files, or private project paths.

## Tests

What unit, contract, workflow, or fake-mode tests should cover this?

## Safety / Privacy Notes

- Do not upload API keys, tokens, `.env` files, or credentials.
- Do not upload raw data.
- Do not upload SMPL-X model files or other restricted model payloads.
- Do not upload private local paths.
- Explain whether live mode is optional or required.

## Non-Goals

What should remain out of scope?
